eyebrow: Cyberpunk Clicker You Can Start Instantly
title: Jump into HEREOS without an account.
description: Start a guest run in one click, build your runner, speed up your income, then push deeper with dungeons, party play, and PvP.
trust: No email required to start. Upgrade your guest run into an account later.
primaryLoopDescription: Clear progression within the first few minutes.

click.title: 1. Hack
click.description: Click to siphon your first credits and start your run.

upgrade.title: 2. Upgrade
upgrade.description: Buy CPC/CPS boosts, unlock talents, and raise your pace.

automate.title: 3. Automate
automate.description: Move from manual clicks to passive income with a clear next milestone.

deepLoopDescription: Once your base loop is solid, the wider meta takes over.

dungeon.title: Dungeon
dungeon.description: Test your build in combat and turn progression into power.

party.title: Party
party.description: Build a team, coordinate your squad, and unlock co-op content.

pvp.title: PvP
pvp.description: Fight other runners once your economy and loadout are online.
